name: Angelica Liqueur 4 (Strega)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the cardamom seeds from the pods and discard the pods. Crush the seeds in a mortar.
2. Work the anise seeds in the mortar for a few minutes.
3. Combine all ingredients except the sugar syrup in a large jar.
4. Shake well and steep for one week.
5. Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth several times.
6. Add the sugar syrup and stir to combine.
7. The liqueur is ready to enjoy. Optionally, you may use honey instead of syrup; just clarify after allowing it to sit for a couple of months if desired.
